segments.text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, how can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Hi, my name is Ryan Harris. I was just passing by and wanted to inquire about scheduled maintenance and a tune-up.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Hi Ryan, nice to meet you! We’d be happy to help with that. What specific services are you interested in?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I think I need an oil change and possibly an engine tune-up as well.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Great choices! Our oil change is between $40 and $60, and the engine tune-up ranges from $150 to $350.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That sounds reasonable. How long do the services take?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: The oil change takes about 30 minutes, and the engine tune-up can take anywhere from 2 to 4 hours, depending on the vehicle.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Okay, and do I need to schedule an appointment for those?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Yes, appointments are preferred, especially for the tune-up. When are you looking to come in?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I was hoping to come in this Saturday. Is that possible?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Let me check... Yes, we have availability on Saturday morning. Would you like to schedule it for 9:00 AM?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: That works for me!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Perfect! I’ll book you in for 9:00 AM this Saturday for the oil change and engine tune-up.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Sounds good. Is there anything else I should know?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Just make sure to bring any service records if you have them, and we’ll handle the rest.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Will do. Also, could you give me an estimate for the total cost?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Sure! Depending on your vehicle and the services provided, you’re looking at about $190 to $410 for both services combined.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Okay, that sounds manageable.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Fantastic! Do you have any specific concerns with your vehicle we should note?
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Just a slight hesitation when accelerating, but I guess that’s part of the tune-up check?
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Yes, we’ll definitely look into that during the tune-up.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Great! I really appreciate your help.
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: You’re welcome! Just to confirm, I have you scheduled for Saturday at 9:00 AM.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Yes, that’s right!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: If you have any questions before then, feel free to call us at this number.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: I will, thanks!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Thank you, Ryan! We look forward to seeing you on Saturday.
segments.speaker: local party

segments.text: Thank you! Bye!
segments.speaker: remote party

segments.text: Bye!
segments.speaker: local party

I was just passing by and wanted to inquire about scheduled maintenance and a tune-up. Hi Ryan, nice to meet you! We’d be happy to help with that. What specific services are you interested in? I think I need an oil change and possibly an engine tune-up as well. Great choices! Our oil change is between $40 and $60, and the engine tune-up ranges from $150 to $350. That sounds reasonable. How long do the services take? The oil change takes about 30 minutes, and the engine tune-up can take anywhere from 2 to 4 hours, depending on the vehicle. Okay, and do I need to schedule an appointment for those? Yes, appointments are preferred, especially for the tune-up. When are you looking to come in? I was hoping to come in this Saturday. Is that possible? Let me check... Yes, we have availability on Saturday morning. Would you like to schedule it for 9:00 AM? That works for me! Perfect! I’ll book you in for 9:00 AM this Saturday for the oil change and engine tune-up. Sounds good. Is there anything else I should know? Just make sure to bring any service records if you have them, and we’ll handle the rest. Will do. Also, could you give me an estimate for the total cost? Sure! Depending on your vehicle and the services provided, you’re looking at about $190 to $410 for both services combined. Okay, that sounds manageable. Fantastic! Do you have any specific concerns with your vehicle we should note? Just a slight hesitation when accelerating, but I guess that’s part of the tune-up check? Yes, we’ll definitely look into that during the tune-up. Great! I really appreciate your help. You’re welcome! Just to confirm, I have you scheduled for Saturday at 9:00 AM. Yes, that’s right! If you have any questions before then, feel free to call us at this number. I will, thanks! Thank you, Ryan! We look forward to seeing you on Saturday. Thank you! Bye! Bye!
